author: mark
text:
Add plugin diagnostics channel on FD 3

Structured user-facing errors (code, hint, task id) used to have
nowhere to go — plugins only had unstructured stderr. Add a
dedicated pipe whose write end balls dup2's to FD 3 in the child
via pre_exec and advertises through BALLS_DIAG_FD. Plugins write
NDJSON PluginDiagnostic records; balls drains, parses, and prints
each on stderr. Available on auth-check, push, and sync.

Stable/safe when unused: plugins that never inspect BALLS_DIAG_FD
never write, the pipe EOFs on exit, and balls renders nothing.
Malformed lines surface a single warning and don't abort the rest.

Pipe+dup2 live in a new plugin::diag module, with unit tests
covering the happy path and both failure branches so tarpaulin can
see the branching lines (the post-fork pre_exec closure itself is
just a one-expression call to the unit-tested dup_fd helper).

Reported by a Jira sync plugin author.
